pi_items.source: Task description specifies 'Save the drawing as: ~/Documents/LibreCAD/nameplate_template.dxf'
Task description: 'Layer BORDER with color White (color index 7)'. Verified against DXF ACI standard: ACI 7 = White (AutoCAD Color Index documentation)
Task description: 'Layer HOLES with color Yellow (color index 2)'. Verified against DXF ACI standard: ACI 2 = Yellow
Task description: 'Layer TEXT with color Cyan (color index 4)'. Verified against DXF ACI standard: ACI 4 = Cyan
Task description specifies outer border 'upper-right at (120, 60)' with lower-left at origin (0,0), dimensions [120, 60]
Task description specifies inner border 'lower-left at (5, 5), upper-right at (115, 55)', dimensions [115-5=110, 55-5=50]
Task description specifies mounting holes with 'radius 2 (diameter 4mm)'
Task description: 'Left hole: Circle centered at (10, 30)' and 'Right hole: Circle centered at (110, 30)'
Task description specifies text label 'MODEL: AG-2024' on TEXT layer
Task description specifies text label 'SERIAL: _______' on TEXT layer
Task description specifies text label 'WEIGHT: 450 kg' on TEXT layer
Task description specifies text label 'MFG DATE: 2024' on TEXT layer

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic CAD drawing task with no external data sources. All metadata claims are verified against the task specification: (1) Output file path is /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/nameplate_template.dxf; (2) Three layers with verified DXF AutoCAD Color Index values: BORDER layer uses ACI 7 (White), HOLES layer uses ACI 2 (Yellow), TEXT layer uses ACI 4 (Cyan); (3) Geometry specifications match exactly: outer rectangle dimensions [120, 60], inner rectangle dimensions [110, 50], two circular holes with radius 2.0 centered at (10,30) and (110,30); (4) Required text includes keywords MODEL, SERIAL, WEIGHT, DATE with additional content AG-2024, 450, 2024. All specifications are internally consistent and conform to DXF standards.
